definition: Event day from existing SEC 8-K Item 2.02 panel
notes: Existing panel only; no new provider query in this preregistration.

definition: First full RTH reaction session mapped from SEC acceptance timestamp
notes: BMO same session and AMC next regular session policy inherited from prior SEC diagnostics.

definition: BMO or AMC classification for reaction session mapping
notes: DMT and UNSPECIFIED remain purged by upstream event policy.

definition: Close at 09:45 divided by open at 09:30 minus one
notes: Direction oracle computed before hypothetical 09:46 entry.

definition: First 15m RTH volume divided by control-window median first 15m volume
notes: Threshold fixed at 3.0 and not selected from XMOM PnL.
Secondary diagnostic context only; not a sweep parameter.

definition: positive_oracle_candidate if first 15m return > 0 and volume ratio >= 3.0
notes: Flat or negative labels authorize no long entry and no short entry.
No optimization of entry time allowed.
No overnight holding in this preregistration.

definition: Spread or quote proxy required by future intraday data contract
Return from entry to same-day close
notes: May be target or metric only after entry; never an input feature.

definition: Whether the gap filled later in the day
